title: SEC2: Chain enum should derive Copy to avoid clone() calls
description:
Chain is a small enum with 3 unit variants (Zcash, Monero, Mobilecoin) and no non-Copy fields. Currently derives Clone but not Copy, causing unnecessary clone() calls:

- cli/src/commands.rs: 8 instances of chain.clone() in PaymentAction construction
- tui/src/event.rs: 2 instances of chain.clone() in PaymentSession construction

Adding #[derive(Copy)] (which implies Clone for enums without non-Copy fields) would eliminate these explicit clones and allow implicit copying. This is a small but measurable efficiency gain on every payment message construction.

No breaking API change — Copy is a strict extension of Clone semantics.
close_reason: all three fixes applied and confirmed clean by clippy+tests
